summary: Frontend integration testing for Extended Analytics, Payment History, and Partner Map features. Backend APIs confirmed working (100%). Frontend has critical authentication persistence issue preventing full UI testing.

minor.issue: Returns 0 partners because it filters by is_active:true but partners don't have this field set. The /map endpoint uses status:approved instead.
All 4 partners have null coordinates (latitude/longitude). Map markers won't display positions.

ui_bugs.issue: Token not persisting across page navigations. User gets logged out when navigating to different pages or when browser automation tool navigates.
Tour modal keeps appearing repeatedly even after being dismissed. Blocks user interactions.

integration_issues.issue: Shows '0 Partner gefunden' because frontend calls /api/partner-search/by-city/all which filters by is_active:true, but partners only have status:approved field

working: Category filters visible (Restaurant, Bar & Club, Café, etc.)
Shows '4 Partner' count in map view
not_working: No markers on map (partners have null coordinates)

admin_analytics.reason: Authentication persistence issue prevents testing admin features. Session lost when navigating to admin panel.

payment_history.reason: Authentication persistence issue prevents testing wallet features. Session lost when navigating to BidBlitz Pay page.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix authentication persistence - token not saving to localStorage properly
HIGH: Fix welcome tour modal - keeps appearing repeatedly after dismissal
MEDIUM: Fix partner data inconsistency - /by-city endpoint uses is_active:true but /map uses status:approved. Either update partners to have is_active:true or change /by-city to use status:approved
LOW: Add coordinates to partners for map markers to display
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext uses safeStorage helper but token still not persisting - investigate if there's a logout being triggered elsewhere
PartnerDirectory.js calls /by-city/all but this endpoint filters by is_active:true which partners don't have
Partner map endpoint uses status:approved filter which works correctly

success_rate.frontend: 30% (only Partner Map partially tested due to auth issues)

mocked_apis_list: Device analytics data in AdminAnalytics.js (line 106-140) - uses mock data when API fails

context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication persistence is broken - token not saving to localStorage. This prevents testing admin analytics and payment history features. Partner Map works but shows 0 partners in grid view due to data inconsistency (is_active vs status field). Backend APIs all working correctly - issue is frontend only.
